name: Autopilot
author: CliDeck
description: Multi-agent orchestration — routes output between agents automatically

settings.label: API Key
settings.placeholder: Falls back to env var (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, etc.)
settings.description: Leave empty to use the standard environment variable for the selected provider

settings.label: Debugging
settings.description: Save each router LLM turn (system prompt, KB history, agent outputs) to ~/.clideck/autopilot/logs/ for inspection
